ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Rs. 12,000 Debit from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

A transaction of Rs.12,000 has been debited from your savings account ending 1234 on 15-Apr-2026.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately by visiting <URL> or calling 1800-XXX-XXXX.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended – Verify Now
spam.body:
Hi [Name],

This is a notice from Binance India Security Team. Due to suspicious activity, your wallet address 0xABC123 has been temporarily suspended.

To restore access and avoid permanent lock, please verify your identity by clicking <URL> within the next 24 hours.

Failure to act will result in permanent suspension of the wallet and potential loss of funds.

If you have any questions, contact support at <URL>.

Regards,
Binance India Security
